allow: Bash(APP_VARIANT=production pnpm exec eas build --profile production --platform ios --non-interactive --no-wait)

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('lang:', d.get\('language'\)\); print\('desc:', d.get\('description'\)\); print\('updated:', d.get\('updated_at'\)\); print\('stars:', d.get\('stargazers_count'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name'], f['type']\) for f in d]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f['name'], f['size']\) for f in d if 'umd' in f['name'].lower\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('test:', d['scripts']['test']\); print\('vitest:', d.get\('devDependencies',{}\).get\('vitest'\)\)")
